scope_note: QA Source Continuity Cert [511]. M3 of docs/specs/QA_MAXWELL_DERIVATION_PROGRAM.md, building on [508], [509], and [510]. Primary mathematical sources: Allen Hatcher, Algebraic Topology (2002), Ch. 2, ISBN 978-0-521-79540-1; Alain Bossavit, Computational Electromagnetism (1998), ISBN 978-0-12-118710-1. Claims only exact finite continuity delta(J)=0 when J=delta(starF). Does not derive sources, inhomogeneous Maxwell, full Maxwell, physical charge/current, physical fields, or electromagnetism.
